title: Senior Investment Banker at Axis Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Axis Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
